meanings.definition: create and charge with a task or function
assign a duty, responsibility or obligation to
examples: She was charged with supervising the creation of a concordance
the one appointed for guard duty

meanings.definition: fixed or established especially by order or command; )
examples: at the time appointed (or the appointed time

meanings.definition: provided with furnishing and accessories (especially of a tasteful kind)
examples: a house that is beautifully appointed
